name: Data Collection from Network Shared Drive
description: Detects bulk data access and collection from network file shares
query:
// Detect bulk data access from network shares
// Trigger on excessive file access from SMB shares
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(copy|cp|xcopy|robocopy|rsync).*\\\\.*\\"
group by hostname, user
having count(*) > 10
within 300 seconds
